steps.title: Use the genre totals
steps.content: The table values show puzzle games far ahead of the smaller genres, with platformer games next. Together, puzzle and platformer sales exceed the other listed genres.

steps.title: Reject false pairings
steps.content: A says puzzle and sports were nearly equal, but puzzle is much larger. B says platformer and education were nearly equal, but platformer is larger. D pairs platformer with sports, which does not beat puzzle plus education. The answer is C.
